title: QA/eval suite + pilot readiness: linter + citation-coverage + staleness + WCAG 2.2 AA + readability + anonymous pre/post instrument + facilitation runbook
context: Before the curriculum can be delivered to real learners through a partner, all quality gates must be running green in CI and the measurement instruments must be ready. This task assembles the complete QA/eval suite: the product-neutrality linter, citation-coverage check, staleness check, WCAG 2.2 AA audit, readability scorer, and the anonymous pre/post comprehension instrument and money-action survey that will measure learner outcomes. The facilitation runbook documents how the partner's facilitators deliver the curriculum and administer the measurement instruments without PII.
objective: Assemble and verify the complete QA/eval suite running green in CI, and build the anonymous pre/post comprehension instrument, money-action survey, and facilitator runbook needed to make the curriculum partner-ready for pilot delivery.
acceptanceCriteria: Full QA suite runs green in CI: product-neutrality linter, citation-coverage check, staleness fail-safe, WCAG 2.2 AA audit, and automated readability scorer (grade-level target verified)

Anonymous, no-PII pre/post comprehension instrument: short quiz covering core module concepts, partner-administrable, with no personally-identifying information collected or stored; aggregate results only

Anonymous money-action survey: captures whether learners took a concrete money-management action (started a budget, opened/started an emergency buffer, made a debt-payoff plan, identified/avoided a scam) — no PII, no individual linkage
Facilitation runbook: documents how a partner facilitator delivers the curriculum, administers the instruments, and returns aggregate anonymous results — no PII at any step
Pilot-readiness checklist: all prerequisite tasks complete (curriculum modules expert-signed-off, linter-clean, accessible, translations reviewed, tools privacy-tested)
QA suite is documented and runnable locally; each check produces actionable output
output: A merged PR adding the complete QA/eval suite (scripts/qa/), the anonymous pre/post comprehension instrument and money-action survey, and the facilitator runbook — all wired into CI and documented for partner use.
